headline: Does EU Approval Of ENFLONSIA Reshape The Bull Case For Merck’s Pipeline Story (MRK)?
summary: Earlier this week, the European Commission approved Merck’s ENFLONSIA (clesrovimab), a long-acting monoclonal antibody to prevent RSV lower respiratory tract disease in newborns and infants during their first RSV season across the EU, Iceland, Liechtenstein and Norway. This decision adds another globally approved product backed by late-stage CLEVER and SMART trial data to Merck’s growing portfolio of infant and pediatric preventive therapies. We’ll now examine how adding an EU-wide RSV...
